title: smoke-cold american baby squid bake
description: A citrusy, juicy, lazy Sunday American dish featuring baby squid, smoked to perfection and served cold. Perfect for a casual get-together with friends.
instructions: Add the baby squid to the smoker and smoke for 1 hour.
Remove the squid from the smoker and let it cool to room temperature.
Cut the squid into bite-sized pieces and place them on a plate.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the squid and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Cover the plate with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Serve the smoked baby squid cold, garnished with lemon wedges and additional parsley if desired.
